Known pre-existing issue flagged (NOT ai-01): restic-snapshot-fresh-rig marker false-positive (backups green, marker stale). 165->166. 2026-07-15 ai-01 post-ship increment (operator-requested): measured the REAL ctx ceilings (35B-A3B: 21.1GiB@131k, 22.8GiB@262k NATIVE — hybrid-attn KV ~14KiB/tok; 27B dense: 21.5@98k, 24.0@163k edge) and PROMOTED coder-strong to the Qwen3.6-27B MTP build (self-speculative decode, n-max 2): bench 34.5->50.3 t/s, real agentic loop 27.5->47.4 t/s (bake-off refactor re-run green, 0 malformed calls); #23658 aligned-ctx bug absent on b9994. coder ctx 32k->131k, coder-strong 32k->98k; opencode/pi client limits bumped.
